channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. military tracks down a sanctioned oil tanker from the Caribbean to the Indian Ocean and ‘shut it down’
item.description: “The vessel tried to defy President Trump’s quarantine — hoping to slip away,” the Pentagon said.

item.title: Anthropic Blasts Pentagon’s Use of Its AI Tool in Venezuela Raid—May Void $200M Contract
item.description: CEO Dario Amodei says Defense Department violated contract by deploying its AI technology to kidnap Venezuela President Maduro

item.title: The Fastest Growing Remote Jobs Might Help Leaders Make Strategic Hiring Decisions
item.description: Hiring locally doesn’t always mean hiring better. For some roles, remote work makes more sense.

item.title: Emotional Restraint Is Holding You Back. Here’s How Leaders Can Utilize Presence to Drive Results
item.description: Emotional presence is not a distraction from performance. It’s actually a prerequisite for sustained performance.

item.title: One of Stanford’s original AI gurus says productivity liftoff has begun after doubling in 2025 amid transition to ‘harvest phase’ along J-curve
item.description: "We are transitioning from an era of AI experimentation to one of structural utility."

item.title: How George Washington’s mistakes in Pennsylvania’s wilderness provided valuable leadership lessons
item.description: This Presidents’ Day , I’ve been thinking about George Washington —not at his finest hour, but possibly at his worst. In 1754, a 22-year-old Washingto...

item.title: These plain-text websites will simplify your internet experience
item.description: Here’s the sad truth about sports score apps: Most of them aren’t all that interested in actually telling you the score. After all, where’s the money ...

item.title: Nike’s New Salary Data Reveals Tech Jobs Paying Up to $425,000
item.description: As part of a realignment focused on technology and automation, the Iconic sportswear brand is looking to hire software engineers, designers and a mark...

item.title: Trump’s border czar says ‘small’ security force will remain in Minnesota after enforcement drawdown. ‘We’ll get back to the original footprint’
item.description: “We already removed well over 1,000 people, and as of Monday, Tuesday, we’ll remove several hundred more,” Homan said.

item.title: U.S. literally can’t afford to lose superpower status as debt looms—so we’re stuck in an ‘increasingly loveless’ marriage with Europe, analyst says
item.description: "Without NATO and its major allies, the U.S. would struggle to maintain its globally dominant role."

item.title: Why U.S. healthcare is still the most expensive in the world
item.description: In announcing its “ Great Healthcare Plan ” in January 2026, the Trump administration became the latest in a long history of efforts by the U.S. gover...

item.title: How your personality impacts your career success (and what you can do about it)
item.description: Personality is one of the most underrated predictors of career success in the world. Defined by scientists as the range of habits and typical behavior...

item.title: Gasoline-starved California is turning to fuel from the Bahamas
item.description: Last year, California sourced more barrels of gasoline from the Bahamas than it had in the prior nine years combined.

item.title: Where mortgage rates are headed in 2026, according to 21 experts
item.description: Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter . Economic forecasting has never be...

item.title: This Risk Factor Will Become a Business Operations Issue in 2026
